calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Anf Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN GOLDBER'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Appearances: Ted Janowsky, Esq. of the Homeless Advocacy Project, (415) 865-9209, appearing for Defendant Steven H. Goldberg, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to get Order signed, not to argue. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open Court. (302/PHA/JW) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN GOLDBERG'S Amended Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. Appearances: Ted Janowsky, Esq. of the Homeless Advocacy Project, (415) 865-9209, appearing for Defendant Steven H. Goldberg, and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to get Order signed, not to argue. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open Court. (302/PHA/JW) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
